description_long: This induction cooker features a sleek, flat black glass-ceramic surface bordered by a thin metallic frame. Four radiant heating zones are visible, each glowing red to indicate active operation, with two larger burners at the front and two smaller ones at the back. The cooktop is entirely smooth, with no protruding knobs or dials, suggesting touch-sensitive controls. Subtle markings and icons are present near the front edge, likely denoting the control panel and burner positions. The overall design is minimalist and modern, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or communal cooking spaces. No brand logo or digital display is visible, and the power cord is not shown in any view.
description: A modern, flat black induction cooker with four glowing red burners and a touch-sensitive control panel along the front edge, framed by a slim metallic border.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four burners, with the control panel and icons clearly visible along the front edge.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the two left burners and the slim metallic border, with partial visibility of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the two larger front burners, with the back burners less prominent and the control panel less visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizing the two right burners and the metallic border, with partial control panel visibility.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is a horizontal strip located along the front edge of the cooktop, featuring touch-sensitive areas with subtle icons and markings for each burner. No physical buttons, knobs, or indicator lights are visible.
